title: Kai's Minecraft Tweaks
description: Vanilla enhancing resource pack with features like a custom colormap, various changed textures and variations for some blocks
body:
## Hello There
With this pack I want to enhance the look of vanilla Minecraft without changing too much. All features are just tiny tweaks that feel true to the nature of Minecraft.

Get a quick overview in this video from 0:24 to 4:24:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QVHNhv8FHGo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Changes since Minecraft 26.1
I decided to separate this pack into different smaller packs so you can specifically choose the features that you like. The following features are now available in their own packs:
- [Block Overlays](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/block-overlays)
- [Bushy Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bushy-leaves-textures)
- [Dark Iron Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dark-iron-textures)
- [Minecraft Dungeons Weapons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-dungeons-textures)

# Features
See the gallery for images of all blocks and items and how they look like in the world.

### Additions
- Variations for barrels, note blocks and cakes
- Vertical double slabs. Double Slabs use a 90° rotated texture of the vanilla block
- Potted mushrooms look like ink & feather (red), a cup of water (brown), a glass of honey (warped), a glass of sweet berry juice (crimson)
- Double slabs of recolored blocks look like the vanilla block

### Tweaks
- A custom colormap for grass and foliage that makes the world look more saturated
- Easter eggs like crowns, a custom language and special chicken sounds
- Some replaced paintings and beds
- Spruce wood soul campfire and torch
- Cattails (Seagrass) grow at hight 63
- Clean lecterns
- Ashless unlit campfires
- Rounded logs
- Petrified oak slabs look like coarse dirt slabs. Use my [Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/kais-crafting-tweaks) to craft them
- Enchantment glint is a very subtle golden shimmer 
- 3D Amethyst and Dripstones
- Wall models modified in creative mode have an inner face

### Recolored
- End stone blocks to work with sand stone
- Actually black black stone
- Actually purple purpur
- Diorite slabs and stairs look like calcite
- Minecraft Dungeons inspired granite
- (Red) cut sandstone looks like bricks
- Dark oak daylight detector
- Haybales
- Loom sides match bookshelves
- Scaffolding
- Wheat seeds

### Special features for OptiFine or CIT and Continuity
- Connected textures for all types of copper
- Battle mage armor
- custom stack textures for arrows, redstone, gunpowder, sugar, glowstone
- Gilded armor
- Invisible armor
- winter hoodies
  
## Credits 
This is a port from my [Planet Minecraft Page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/kai-s-1-16-minecraft-tweaks/).
I will work on the things on the ToDo list in the future and also add new ideas. If you have any suggestions what I should change or if you find a bug pls tell me. If you want to see the latest development be sure to join my [discord](https://discord.gg/ejBJJSr), that's where I post all the editing progress!

You can also visit my [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@Kai1907/featured) channel to see cool builds I made with this pack.

I consider retexturing:  
paintings  
crops

## Using my pack

Please credit this page if you are using this pack in a video or pictures on social media. Have fun playing with it and also check out other packs on my Modrinth profile! (they are additions to this one!)
